title: Ubiquiti U6+ - UniFi 6+ Access Point
description: UniFi 6+ Access Point is a basic Dual Band WiFi 6 AP (2.4GHz and 5GHz) for smaller halls, warehouses or offices. The U6+ is capable of great throughputs. In 5 GHz band (2x2 MIMO) it is 2402 Mbps using 160 MHz bandwidth and in 2.4 GHz (2x2 MIMO) it is 574 Mbps , allowing it to support more than 300 concurrently connected clients. To connect to the network, the Access Point has Gigabit Ethernet with support for active (802.3at) as well as passive (44 to 57V) PoE Dual band WiFi 6, support 802.11a/b/g/n/ac/ax (WiFi 6) 5 GHz bandwidth up to 2402 Mbps (2x2 MIMO) 2.4 GHz bandwidth up to 574 Mbps (2x2 MIMO) Antenna gain - 2.4GHz (3 dBi) and 5GHz (5.4 dBi) WPA/WPA2/ WPA3 encryption Gigabit LAN port Power supply via 802.3af or passive 44 to 57V PoE, consumption 9W Supported by UniFi Controller since version 7.3.76 To manage the device, you need to download the original software called UniFi Network Controller from the official website, thanks to which the entire network can be controlled. The indisputable advantage of UniFi Controller is that it is completely free without any restrictions ! This central management will allow you to upload maps and set basic parameters as well as advanced functions such as SSID, guest account, start page, traffic statistics and the list and status of associated clients… Fast Roaming - uninterrupted transition between individual APs Wireless uplink (suitable where it is impossible to get a data cable) Up to 8 SSIDs Detailed traffic statistics Guest network Load balance - maintaining an even load / switching clients Speed limiting for each SSID Device…
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g, 802.11ax Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 2402 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 574 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 23 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 23 Security WPA, WPA2, WPA3 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Internal antennas 4 Roaming Yes Antenna gain [dBi] 3, 5,4 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 44 .. 57V DC Power type PoE PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 9 Physical characteristics Design On the wall, Ceiling Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 30 up to 60 Weight [g] 338 Width [mm] 160 Height [mm] 33 Depth [mm] 160
